title: Ubiquiti U6-Pro - UniFi Access Point WiFi 6 Pro
description: UniFi Access Point WiFi 6 Pro (U6-Pro) is a high-performance Dual-band WiFi 6 Access Point and is ideal for home and office use. U6-Pro is able to achieve great throughput - in the band 5 GHz (4Ã4 MU-MIMO) it is 4800 Mbps when used with 160 MHz bandwidth and in 2.4 GHz (2Ã2 MIMO) is 574 Mbps , which allows it to support more than 300 simultaneously connected clients. Thanks to its stealthy looks, it fits into any environment and due to its design with IP54 protection , it can be used… Dual-band WiFi 6, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax support 5GHz throughput up to 4804 Mbps (4x4 MU-MIMO) 2.4GHz throughput up to 574 Mbps (2x2 MIMO) Antenna gain - 2.4GHz (4 dBi), 5GHz (6 dBi) WPA/WPA2/WPA3 encryption Gigabit LAN port Power supply via 802.3at or passive 44 to 57V PoE, 13 W consumption Degree of protection IP54 (can be installed indoors and partly also outdoors) Supported by UniFi Controller from version 6.1.56 To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, which allows you to control the entire network. The undeniable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management allows you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, home page, traffic statistics and list and status of associated clients always easily and… Fast Roaming - seamless transition between APs Wireless uplink (useful where you can't get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest Network Load balance - maintaining a…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ax, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 4804 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 6 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 6 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at, 44 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 13 Physical characteristics Protection class IP54 Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 460 Width [mm] 197 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 197 Software Operating mode Access Point IPv6 support Transparent (bridge mode) Default IP address Dynamic from DHCP Default and ubnt / ubnt
